remedies: Drink plenty of fluids (water, juice, clear broth).
Get plenty of rest to help your immune system.
Gargle with salt water for a sore throat.
common cold.watch_out: Seek care if you have a fever lasting more than 3 days or difficulty breathing.

remedies: Rest in a quiet, dark room.
Apply a cool cloth or ice pack to your forehead.
headache.watch_out: Go to the ER for a sudden, 'thunderclap' headache or if accompanied by a stiff neck.

remedies: Avoid bright lights and loud noises.
Try a small amount of caffeine in the early stages.
migraine.watch_out: Seek help if you experience vision loss or weakness on one side of the body.

remedies: Try the BRAT diet (Bananas, Rice, Applesauce, Toast).
Sip ginger ale or peppermint tea.
Use a heating pad on your abdomen for comfort.
stomach ache.watch_out: Consult a doctor if you have blood in your stool or severe, localized pain.
